Introduction
Astrology is a branch of knowledge that tries to study time.
The various names ascribed to" astrology such as Jyotisha,
Jyotisastra, Kalatantra, Kalavidhana sastra are all proof of
the same. How these names got ascribed to astrology? The
sages themselves gives answer to the same.
